attempts.reflection: You need to prioritize obtaining iron_ingot before attempting to craft diamond_leggings. Specifically, you should have crafted an iron_pickaxe after gathering enough iron_ore and smelting it into iron_ingots. Additionally, ensure you have a crafting_table available at all times for crafting items. Correct the order by first gathering iron_ore, then smelting it into iron_ingots, and finally crafting an iron_pickaxe. This will allow you to proceed with crafting more advanced items like diamond_leggings.
